epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Urgency with or without urge incontinence; exclude infection and obstruction

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; stigma and limited specialist care

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care and urology evaluation; limited urodynamics
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Behavioral therapy, antimuscarinics; mirabegron in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underreporting and limited access to urology services
